title: Bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo from 1.8.0 to 1.10.1
body:
Bumps [github.com/onsi/ginkgo](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo) from 1.8.0 to 1.10.1.
Release notes *Sourced from [github.com/onsi/ginkgo's releases](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/releases).* > ## v1.10.1 > ### Fixes > - stack backtrace: fix skipping ([#600](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/600)) [2a4c0bd] > > ## v1.10.0 > ### Fixes > - stack backtrace: fix alignment and skipping [66915d6] > - fix typo in documentation [8f97b93] > > ## v1.9.0 > ## Features > - Option to print output into report, when tests have passed [0545415] > > ## Fixes > - Fixed typos in comments [0ecbc58] > - gofmt code [a7f8bfb] > - Simplify code [7454d00] > - Simplify concatenation, incrementation and function assignment [4825557] > - Avoid unnecessary conversions [9d9403c] > - JUnit: include more detailed information about panic [19cca4b] > - Print help to stdout when the user asks for help [4cb7441]
Changelog *Sourced from [github.com/onsi/ginkgo's changelog](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md).* > ## 1.10.1 > > ## Fixes > - stack backtrace: fix skipping ([#600](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/600)) [2a4c0bd] > > ## 1.10.0 > > ## Fixes > - stack backtrace: fix alignment and skipping [66915d6] > - fix typo in documentation [8f97b93] > > ## 1.9.0 > > ## Features > - Option to print output into report, when tests have passed [0545415] > > ## Fixes > - Fixed typos in comments [0ecbc58] > - gofmt code [a7f8bfb] > - Simplify code [7454d00] > - Simplify concatenation, incrementation and function assignment [4825557] > - Avoid unnecessary conversions [9d9403c] > - JUnit: include more detailed information about panic [19cca4b] > - Print help to stdout when the user asks for help [4cb7441]
Commits - [`974566c`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/974566c482abc93ffd3df6f4626e79076c7ed290) v1.10.1 - [`2a4c0bd`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/2a4c0bd1b99cea55e0a35f83a587f814dc2af24e) stack backtrace: fix skipping ([#600](https://github-redirect.dependabot.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/600)) - [`f90f37d`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/f90f37d87fa6b1dd9625e2b1e83c23ffae3de228) v1.10.0 - [`66915d6`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/66915d68818eb42dadcd44b3e2e3a3bf75da2a74) stack backtrace: fix alignment and skipping - [`8f97b93`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/8f97b93899b20732ef9de1789ecd356081d8bd6c) fix typo in documentation - [`7e8b50d`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/7e8b50db0c6d0a15ac0eb015d4ca64e7e7e2c88c) v1.9.0 - [`0ecbc58`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/0ecbc58698389c4a38c1b07e092f686286a73013) Fixed typos in comments - [`a7f8bfb`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/a7f8bfbfb091f841795e1cdc1e98e4ada2133d6c) gofmt code - [`7454d00`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/7454d006dd26650c602c1715ae1434000fdab1cb) Simplify code - [`4825557`](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/4825557adf4f9e4060f2068682521a4af149a5d5) Simplify concatenation, incrementation and function assignment - Additional commits viewable in [compare view](https://github.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v1.8.0...v1.10.1)

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://api.dependabot.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/onsi/ginkgo&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.8.0&new-version=1.10.1)](https://dependabot.com/compatibility-score.html?dependency-name=github.com/onsi/ginkgo&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=1.8.0&new-version=1.10.1) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) --- **Note:** This repo was added to Dependabot recently, so you'll receive a maximum of 5 PRs for your first few update runs. Once an update run creates fewer than 5 PRs we'll remove that limit. You can always request more updates by clicking `Bump now` in your [Dependabot dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com).
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot use these labels` will set the current labels as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these reviewers` will set the current reviewers as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use these assignees` will set the current assignees as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot use this milestone` will set the current milestone as the default for future PRs for this repo and language - `@dependabot badge me` will comment on this PR with code to add a "Dependabot enabled" badge to your readme Additionally, you can set the following in your Dependabot [dashboard](https://app.dependabot.com): - Update frequency (including time of day and day of week) - Pull request limits (per update run and/or open at any time) - Out-of-range updates (receive only lockfile updates, if desired) - Security updates (receive only security updates, if desired) Finally, you can contact us by mentioning @dependabot.

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@vrothberg this one doesn't look happy, PTAL
Thanks for checking, @TomSweeneyRedHat! I forget to push the updated commit. Now it should work (or at least pass the vendor checks).
This looks like make vendor was never run and the updated packages in the vendor directory was not pulled into the PR.

> This looks like make vendor was never run and the updated packages in the vendor directory was not pulled into the PR.

Looks like I forgot to push :see_no_evil:
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1876) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

:pushpin: Commit 5f7d3d4 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 5f7d3d4dd91a629b717f44c8930c63d7867e265d -->

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/96f9993b25f31bea5438010da14c3eac9790eb60.1569979840402050048/index.html), [status-travis](https://travis-ci.org/containers/buildah/builds/592335504?utm_source=github_status&utm_medium=notification)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing 96f9993b25f31bea5438010da14c3eac9790eb60 to master...

OK, I won't notify you again about this release, but will get in touch when a new version is available. If you'd rather skip all updates until the next major or minor version, let me know by commenting `@dependabot ignore this major version` or `@dependabot ignore this minor version`.

If you change your mind, just re-open this PR and I'll resolve any conflicts on it.
